headline: Jeff Bezos Sets His Sights on a $70 Trillion Market. That’s 10X Bigger than the Ecommerce Market Amazon Dominated

headline: We’re Bullish on Amazon With 36% Upside From Current Levels
summary: Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) trades at $237.50 after a 10.33% pullback over the last month. With AWS reaccelerating, advertising compounding, and custom silicon scaling fast, I see the recent weakness as a setup for upside. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for Amazon is $322.05 over the next 12 months, implying 35.6% upside. Our recommendation is buy, ... We’re Bullish on Amazon With 36% Upside From Current Levels

headline: Amazon quietly building a moat to outlast the AI boom

For many investors, Amazon's (AMZN) earnings engine is Amazon Web Services, and that business still has some upside. But the next AWS story may not ...
